testsuite.name: Launch Keyless App in Real Device

testcase.name: Should launch the Keyless app in POCO
testcase.classname: Launch Keyless App in Real Device

failure.message: Failed [equal]: (Device setup failed — device may not be connected: element ("id:com.keyless_dubai:id/loginTxt") still not displayed after 5000ms) - expected "null" but got: "Error: element ("id:com.keyless_dubai:id/loginTxt") still not displayed after 5000ms at file:///C:/Users/shibi/OneDrive%20-%20SIRA.Gov.AE/keyless-appium/node_modules/webdriverio/build/node.js:6013:15 at async Element.wrapCommandFn (file:///C:/Users/shibi/OneDrive%20-%20SIRA.Gov.AE/keyless-appium/node_modules/@wdio/utils/build/index.js:982:23) at async Element.elementErrorHandlerCallbackFn (file:///C:/Users/shibi/OneDrive%20-%20SIRA.Gov.AE/keyless-appium/node_modules/webdriverio/build/node.js:9601:24) at async Element.wrapCommandFn (file:///C:/Users/shibi/OneDrive%20-%20SIRA.Gov.AE/keyless-appium/node_modules/@wdio/utils/build/index.js:982:23) at async Element.wrapCommandFn (file:///C:/Users/shibi/OneDrive%20-%20SIRA.Gov.AE/keyless-appium/node_modules/@wdio/utils/build/index.js:982:23) at async Element.elementErrorHandlerCallbackFn (file:///C:/Users/shibi/OneDrive%20-%20SIRA.Gov.AE/keyless-appium/node_modules/webdriverio/build/node.js:9601:24) at async Element.wrapCommandFn (file:///C:/Users/shibi/OneDrive%20-%20SIRA.Gov.AE/keyless-appium/node_modules/@wdio/utils/build/index.js:982:23) at async Object.verifyLoginButton (C:\Users\shibi\OneDrive - SIRA.Gov.AE\keyless-appium\utlis\welcomeScreenUtlis.js:41:5) at async configAppiumTest (C:\Users\shibi\OneDrive - SIRA.Gov.AE\keyless-appium\config\config.js:53:5) at async DescribeInstance.<anonymous> (C:\Users\shibi\OneDrive - SIRA.Gov.AE\keyless-appium\nightwatch\tests\Launch Keyless.js:13:22)" (14ms)

testcase.failure: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '$') at Object.verifyKeylessIcon (C:\Users\shibi\OneDrive - SIRA.Gov.AE\keyless-appium\utlis\welcomeScreenUtlis.js:13:44) at DescribeInstance.<anonymous> (C:\Users\shibi\OneDrive - SIRA.Gov.AE\keyless-appium\nightwatch\tests\Launch Keyless.js:31:34)
